ham.subject: Your AcmeCloud Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the 12‑month experience with AcmeCloud. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription plan (Premium‑Pro) is set to renew on **June 30, 2026**.

To ensure uninterrupted service, please review the renewal details below:

• **Plan**: Premium‑Pro
• **Billing Amount**: $299.99/month
• **Next Billing Date**: June 30, 2026

If you wish to make any changes—such as upgrading to Enterprise, adjusting the billing cycle, or updating your payment method—log in to your account at <URL> or simply reply to this email and we’ll be happy to assist.

Thank you for choosing AcmeCloud. We value your business and look forward to serving you in the coming year.

Best regards,

AcmeCloud Support Team
support@acmecloud.com
+1‑800‑555‑1234

spam.subject: Congratulations! You've Been Awarded a $10,000 University Scholarship – Claim Now
spam.body:
Dear Student,

On behalf of the International Student Foundation, we are delighted to inform you that you have been selected as a recipient of the prestigious **Global Scholars Grant**. Your academic achievements have impressed our selection committee, and you are now eligible for a **$10,000 scholarship** to support your studies at any accredited university worldwide.

To secure your award, please complete the verification process within the next 48 hours. Failure to do so may result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

**Action Required:**
1. Click the link below to access the secure scholarship portal.
2. Submit your personal details, academic transcripts, and proof of enrollment.
3. Confirm your acceptance of the scholarship.

<URL>

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. Should you have any questions, please contact our scholarship office at scholarship@internationalfoundation.org.

Warm regards,

Dr. Eleanor Finch
Director, International Student Foundation
finch@internationalfoundation.org
+1‑212‑555‑9876
